untranslatable_reason: Pattern performance varies significantly based on unspecified 'yearly price position' (requires 252-day range data not in indicators), gap formation logic (requires multi-bar gap detection), and throwback/pullback timing within 2-week window (temporal condition difficult to encode as single-bar rule). Author silent on stop loss placement and profit targets. Conversion represents best-effort approximation using 20-day Donchian channels and price position quantiles.
